'''Udin''' was a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who was hired by [[Eugene Talmont]] to track down [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. He took the commission aspiring to get a better position off of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] if he succeeded in capturing the bounty.<ref name="CSWE" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The illustration used to represent Udin was a modified version of the image of [[Garindan/Legends|Garindan]] from ''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]''
